content:
CALL TRANSCRIPT
Customer: Meridian Health Systems
Customer ID: C001
Contract ID: K013
Account Executive: Sarah Chen
Call Type: QBR Follow-up
Date: September 10, 2024
Participants: Sarah Chen (AE), Dr. Linda Forsythe (Director of Clinical Operations), Dr. Marcus Hill (Chief Medical Officer)

Sarah Chen: Thanks for joining, Dr. Hill. Linda mentioned you wanted to hear more about the API integration roadmap.

Dr. Hill: That's right. We're evaluating our EHR vendor's integration marketplace and InsightIQ came up as a potential data destination. I wanted to understand where that stands on your side.

Sarah Chen: The API integration module is currently in beta with a small group of customers. We're targeting general availability in Q4 2024. It supports bidirectional data sync with the major EHR platforms — I can get you the compatibility list after this call.

Dr. Hill: That would be helpful. If it works with our EHR, this becomes a much more strategic tool for us. Right now we're exporting data manually every week, which introduces lag.

Dr. Forsythe: The manual export is honestly the biggest friction point we have left. Everything else is working well.

Sarah Chen: Understood. I'll connect you with our solutions engineer to do a technical scoping session once I send over the compatibility list. If your EHR is on the list, we can potentially get you into the beta.

Dr. Hill: That would be ideal. Linda, anything else from your team?

Dr. Forsythe: One request — our new facility is fully onboarded now and the team there has asked about a training refresher. Can we schedule something for October?

Sarah Chen: Absolutely. I'll coordinate with our customer success team and get something on the calendar this week.
